# `api.jobs.get_update_page_config`

> `GET /job/{jobDisplayId}/updatePageConfig` — ACPortal

**Python**


**CLI**

```bash

```

GET /job/{jobDisplayId}/updatePageConfig (ACPortal)

| Field | Type | Required | Description |

| `pageControls` | `Optional[int]` | no | Page control bitmask |
